/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_cwordparse.dir/src/cwordparse_wrapper.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/test_cwordparse.dir/tests/test-cwordparse-generated.cpp.o" -o test_cwordparse  /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest_main.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest.a
